folderAriaLabelX.comment: Aria-label for a folder node in the picker tree

collapse.comment: Aria-label for collapse button on a folder tree node

expand.comment: Aria-label for expand button on a folder tree node

addSubfolderToX.comment: Aria-label for add subfolder button on a folder node

folderLabel.comment: Label prefix for the selected folder path in the folder picker

noFoldersYet.comment: Empty state message in folder picker when there are no folders

createFirstFolder.comment: Button text to create the first folder when there are none

folderCreated.comment: Snackbar message after creating a folder

folderAlreadyExists.comment: Snackbar message when trying to create a folder that already exists

createFolderFailed.comment: Snackbar error message when folder creation fails
createFolderFailed.es: No se pudo crear la carpeta

selectorAriaLabelX.comment: Aria-label for the folder picker header button. { path } is the currently selected folder path

treeAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the folder tree container in the folder picker
